Grouped by processed date (the moment the order reaches the rack). Orders still in processing or folding don't appear yet. Excludes cancelled, skipped, pickup-failed, and $0 placeholder orders. Refunded orders stay counted but deduct in the Refunds column.

Pricing & Billing
On-account customers are billed by invoice — no card required up front. You can assign them to a billing group later from the customer panel.
Plan & Referral Source
Internal Notes (staff only)
Payment via Stripe — card numbers are never stored here. Use Send Card Setup Link to email the customer a secure Stripe link to add their card.

Archive Order

Reason *
This note is for your records — customer won't see it.
Archiving hides this order from Overview and the active Orders tabs. The order, route-stop history, and customer record stay intact and searchable. You can restore it anytime from the Archived tab.
